name: YAOC2 Sandbox — TheHive Case Create
description: Sandbox workflow for creating a case in TheHive. Accepts structured parameters. Does not accept raw user text.

nodes.name: Entry (Execute Workflow Trigger)
nodes.notes: Receives: { title, description, severity (1-3), tlp (0-3), tags[], observables[] }

nodes.name: Validate Parameters (Code)
nodes.notes: Clamp severity 1-3, tlp 0-3. Validate observables array if present. Sanitise title/description (strip HTML).

nodes.name: Add Observables (HTTP Request)
nodes.notes: If observables[] is non-empty: POST each to {{ $env.THEHIVE_BASE_URL }}/api/case/<case_id>/artifact.
